## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass: `uv run pytest tests/unit/ -q`
- [ ] Ruff lint/format clean: `uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] Integration tests pass (if applicable): `uv run pytest tests/integration/ -v`
- [ ] E2E smoke test passes (if applicable): `python tests/e2e/test_full_pipeline_real.py`
- [ ] Frontend builds without errors: `cd frontend && npm run build`
